scoreMovementRationale.baselineEvidence: FEAT-135 v0.1.0 remains accepted with one good sample and preserved tamper coverage.
scoreMovementRationale.refreshEvidence: FEAT-151 v0.2.0 includes 5 good-sample profiles, 28 tamper/drift fixtures, stable expected result outputs, stale-version drift checks, and no-secret scan evidence.
